speaker: seller

args.message: Step right up! Feast your eyes on this magnificent 2017 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 LT. This truck isn't just a vehicle; it's a partner ready to tackle anything you throw at it, from hauling lumber to hitting the trails. With its powerful 5.3L V8, legendary reliability, and a suite of features, it's the perfect blend of brawn and brains. Come on, let's talk numbers!

args.message: Let's cut to the chase. What's the full ownership history? How many owners has it had, and can you provide a vehicle history report showing no accidents or major damage?

speaker: seller

args.message: This Silverado has been meticulously cared for by its previous owner. We don't have a full report detailing every single owner, but what I can tell you is that it's been a local truck its whole life and has never been in any accidents. Clean history, clean title, clean truck. You won't find a better example for the price, believe me!

args.message: Your response is vague. 'Meticulously cared for by its previous owner' isn't specific. How many owners, exactly? And what specifically does 'clean history' mean without a vehicle history report to back it up? I need a full report to verify the accident history and ownership, not just your word.

speaker: seller

args.message: Look, I understand you want all the details, and that's smart. What I meant by 'meticulously cared for' is that the owner who traded it in was a real enthusiast – always kept it in the garage, regular oil changes, the works. As for the number of owners, it's been with one owner for the majority of its life, someone who really cherished it. And when I say 'clean history,' I mean no salvage titles, no flood damage, no major red flags like that. We stand by our vehicles, and this one is no exception. I've got a stack of service records right here that show consistent maintenance. We can go through those with you right now if you like!

args.message: So, what do you think? Ready to take this beauty for a spin? I tell you, these V8 Silverados hold their value like gold. This one, with the LT trim and all the options, is a steal at $26,495. I saw a similar one go for nearly $30k at auction last week!

args.message: The history inspection revealed an overdue transmission fluid service by 18,000 miles. This is a significant maintenance item that will need to be addressed immediately. Considering this, and the general uncertainty given the lack of a full history report from your end, I'm offering $25,500. This accounts for the cost of the necessary service and reflects the actual condition of the vehicle.
